title: Quantum Flux
description: Particles that form ephemeral connections based on proximity, creating a shifting web of light and shadow.

title: Neon Smoke Tendrils
description: Ultra-light particles with high friction that leave long, fading trails, mimicking the movement of colored smoke in a vacuum.

title: Galaxy Spiral Assembler
description: Particles influenced by a central black hole force, creating a rotating spiral galaxy with varying density disks.
script: let stars=[];function setup(){createCanvas(600,600);for(let i=0;i<800;i++)stars.push({a:random(TWO_PI),r:random(50,300),s:random(0.01,0.03)})}function draw(){background(10,20);translate(width/2,height/2);noStroke();for(let s of stars){s.a+=s.s;let x=cos(s.a)*s.r;let y=sin(s.a)*s.r;fill(150,200,255,150);ellipse(x,y,2,2)}}

title: Bioluminescent Rain
description: Vertical particle streams that splash and dissipate upon reaching a virtual floor, using glow effects.

title: Kinetic Sand Vibration
description: Small grains that settle into Chladni-like patterns driven by invisible frequency waves across the canvas.

title: Orbiting Fireflies
description: Pairs of particles that orbit each other while drifting through space, creating a dual-light trace effect.

title: Aura Field Disturbance
description: A dense field of static particles that react to a moving invisible attractor, creating a ripple in a sea of dots.
script: let grid=[];function setup(){createCanvas(600,600);for(let x=0;x<width;x+=15)for(let y=0;y<height;y+=15)grid.push(createVector(x,y))}function draw(){background(255);let mx=width/2+cos(frameCount*0.05)*150;let my=height/2+sin(frameCount*0.03)*150;grid.forEach(p=>{let d=dist(mx,my,p.x,p.y);let off=map(min(d,100),0,100,15,0);fill(0);ellipse(p.x+random(-off,off),p.y+random(-off,off),2,2)})}

title: Abstract Snow Drift
description: Soft, translucent particles that follow a complex wind field, accumulating visually in the center of the screen.

title: Interactive Particle Vortex
description: A dense field of kinetic particles that visually swarms around the mouse cursor, creating a swirling vortex of light.
howToInteract: Move your mouse over the canvas to attract and swirl the particle swarm.
script: let particles=[];function setup(){createCanvas(windowWidth,windowHeight);for(let i=0;i<1000;i++)particles.push(new P())}function draw(){background(10,30);particles.forEach(p=>{p.update();p.show()})}class P{constructor(){this.pos=createVector(random(width),random(height));this.vel=p5.Vector.random2D();this.acc=createVector(0,0);this.maxs=4;this.maxf=0.1}update(){let mouse=createVector(mouseX,mouseY);let dir=p5.Vector.sub(mouse,this.pos);let d=dir.mag();if(d<200){dir.setMag(map(d,0,200,this.maxs,0));let steer=p5.Vector.sub(dir,this.vel);steer.limit(this.maxf);this.acc.add(steer)}else{this.acc.add(p5.Vector.random2D().mult(0.01))}this.vel.add(this.acc);this.vel.limit(this.maxs);this.pos.add(this.vel);this.acc.mult(0);this.handleEdges()}show(){stroke(100,200,255,150);strokeWeight(2);point(this.pos.x,this.pos.y)}handleEdges(){if(this.pos.x<0)this.pos.x=width;if(this.pos.x>width)this.pos.x=0;if(this.pos.y<0)this.pos.y=height;if(this.pos.y>height)this.pos.y=0}}

title: Magnetic Repulsion Grid
description: A grid of static dots that behave like interconnected magnets. The mouse cursor acts as a powerful repelling magnet, distorting the grid in real-time.
howToInteract: Move your mouse to push the particles away. They will spring back when the mouse moves away.
script: let nodes=[];let gap=20;function setup(){createCanvas(windowWidth,600);for(let x=gap;x<width;x+=gap){for(let y=gap;y<height;y+=gap){nodes.push(new Node(x,y))}}}function draw(){background(240);nodes.forEach(n=>{n.update();n.show()})}class Node{constructor(x,y){this.orig=createVector(x,y);this.pos=createVector(x,y);this.vel=createVector(0,0);this.acc=createVector(0,0);this.k=0.1;this.damp=0.9}update(){let mouse=createVector(mouseX,mouseY);let dir=p5.Vector.sub(this.pos,mouse);let d=dir.mag();if(d<150){let force=map(d,0,150,20,0);dir.setMag(force);this.acc.add(dir)}let spring=p5.Vector.sub(this.orig,this.pos);spring.mult(this.k);this.acc.add(spring);this.vel.add(this.acc);this.vel.mult(this.damp);this.pos.add(this.vel);this.acc.mult(0)}show(){fill(0,100,200);noStroke();ellipse(this.pos.x,this.pos.y,4,4);stroke(0,100,200,50);line(this.pos.x,this.pos.y,this.orig.x,this.orig.y)}}

title: Neural Synapse Pulse
description: A particle simulation mimicking neural firing, where signals travel between nodes leaving glowing biosynthetic trails.

title: Gravity Well Simulation
description: Particles trapped in a multi-body gravity system, orbiting invisible mass points and creating complex spirographic paths.

title: Kinetic Vector Surface
description: A dense field of responsive vectors that align and pulsate based on the cursor's velocity and position, simulating a magnetic liquid membrane.
howToInteract: Move your mouse quickly to create waves; the faster you move, the more the 'liquid' reacts and glows.
script: let grid = 20; function setup() { createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight); strokeCap(ROUND); } function draw() { background(5); for (let x = grid; x < width; x += grid) { for (let y = grid; y < height; y += grid) { let d = dist(mouseX, mouseY, x, y); let angle = atan2(mouseY - y, mouseX - x); let mag = map(min(d, 200), 0, 200, 20, 0); let speed = dist(mouseX, mouseY, pmouseX, pmouseY); let r = map(sin(frameCount * 0.1 + d * 0.05), -1, 1, 100, 255); push(); translate(x, y); rotate(angle); stroke(r, speed * 5, 255 - r, 150); strokeWeight(map(mag, 0, 20, 1, 4)); line(0, 0, mag + speed/2, 0); pop(); } } }

title: Magnetic Fluid Surface
description: An interactive mesh that acts like a ferrofluid, spikes and ripples follow the mouse with elastic tension.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to pull the liquid spikes toward the cursor.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(600,600)}function draw(){background(0);stroke(255,150);for(let x=50;x<width;x+=30){for(let y=50;y<height;y+=30){let d=dist(mouseX,mouseY,x,y);let ang=atan2(mouseY-y,mouseX-x);let mag=map(min(d,200),0,200,40,0);line(x,y,x+cos(ang)*mag,y+sin(ang)*mag);ellipse(x+cos(ang)*mag,y+sin(ang)*mag,2,2)}}}

title: Soundwave Simulator
description: Visualizes a virtual sound frequency that reacts to horizontal mouse position for amplitude and vertical for pitch.
howToInteract: Move the mouse: X controls amplitude, Y controls frequency density.

title: Particle repulsion brush
description: A field of dots that flee from the mouse and slowly return to their original grid position.
howToInteract: Pass the mouse over the dots to scatter them.

title: Kaleidoscopic Pointer
description: A mirrored drawing tool that replicates mouse movement across 8 axes with shifting neon colors.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to draw complex kaleidoscopic patterns in real-time.

title: Elastic Cube Deformer
description: A 3D cube in a spatial environment that squashes and stretches based on mouse proximity.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to distort the cube's dimensions in 3D space.

title: Floating Geometry Grid
description: A grid of 3D boxes that react to a central wave function, creating a rhythmic architectural pulse.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(500,500,WEBGL)}function draw(){background(10);rotateX(PI/3);let offset=0;for(let y=-200;y<200;y+=20){for(let x=-200;x<200;x+=20){let d=dist(x,y,0,0);let a=d*0.05-frameCount*0.05;let h=map(sin(a),-1,1,20,150);push();translate(x,y,h/2);fill(map(h,20,150,50,255),100,200);box(18,18,h);pop()}}}

title: Hyperlight Drifter Grid
description: An isometric perspective grid that glows with neon energy as waves pass through it.

title: Deformed Polygon Mesh
description: A structural grid of polygons that warps and folds based on a mathematical ripple function.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(500,500);fill(255,50);stroke(0,150)}function draw(){background(240);let res=20;for(let x=50;x<width-50;x+=res){for(let y=50;y<height-50;y+=res){let d=dist(x,y,width/2,height/2);let off=sin(d*0.05-frameCount*0.1)*20;beginShape();vertex(x+off,y);vertex(x+res+off,y);vertex(x+res,y+res+off);vertex(x,y+res+off);endShape(CLOSE)}}}

title: Hyperbolic Deformation Grid
description: A grid distorted by a simulated gravitational lens, creating a localized magnification effect that moves in a continuous loop.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(800,800)}function draw(){background(255);stroke(0);noFill();let step=20;let centerX=width/2+cos(frameCount*0.02)*100;let centerY=height/2+sin(frameCount*0.02)*100;for(let x=0;x<width;x+=step){beginShape();for(let y=0;y<height;y+=5){let d=dist(x,y,centerX,centerY);let offset=map(d,0,200,40,0,true);let nx=x+(x-centerX)/d*offset;let ny=y+(y-centerY)/d*offset;if(d<1)nx=x;vertex(nx,ny)}endShape()}for(let y=0;y<height;y+=step){beginShape();for(let x=0;x<width;x+=5){let d=dist(x,y,centerX,centerY);let offset=map(d,0,200,40,0,true);let nx=x+(x-centerX)/d*offset;let ny=y+(y-centerY)/d*offset;vertex(nx,ny)}endShape()}}

title: Harmonograph Traces
description: Complex geometric curves generated by the intersection of multiple pendulums' harmonic motions.

title: Monochrome Flow Field
description: High-contrast ink-like strokes following a complex Perlin noise field, creating a calligraphic texture.

title: Geometric Nebula
description: Abstract radial geometry that expands and contracts using layered trigonometric functions and transparency.

title: Floating Islands Silhouette
description: Procedural generation of floating landmasses using noise-based vertex displacement and atmospheric perspective.

title: Ink Drop Diffusion
description: Particles that behave like ink drops in water, spreading outward and losing opacity in an organic, fluid way.

title: Aperiodic Monotile Flow
description: A complex tiling generation based on aperiodic geometry, where shapes shift their internal luminescence according to a global noise field.

title: Op-Art Pulsing Grid
description: An optical illusion pattern where alternating black and white squares expand and contract in a checkerboard wave.
script: function setup(){createCanvas(600,600);noStroke()}function draw(){background(255);let s=40;for(let x=0;x<width;x+=s){for(let y=0;y<height;y+=s){let d=dist(x,y,width/2,height/2);let off=sin(d*0.05-frameCount*0.1)*s/2;fill((x+y)/s%2==0?0:255);rect(x+off/2,y+off/2,s-off,s-off)}}}

title: Islamic Geometric Lattice
description: A generative pattern based on 8-fold symmetry, creating complex interlocking stars and polygons.
